title: PortalMod original sounds
description: This resource pack adds the sounds from Portal 2 into PortalMod, replacing the custom sounds.
body:
This resource pack replaces the custom sounds of PortalMod with original sounds from Portal 2.

PortalMod by Snowy Shack: https://modrinth.com/mod/portalmod

Disclaimer: This resource pack contains audio assets from Portal 2, which are the property of Valve Corporation. This is a non-commercial fan project created for the community. I do not claim ownership of the original sound files.
